plan.summary: This 6-week roadmap is designed to transition a Software Engineer to an AI Solution Architect by focusing on high-priority skill gaps. It emphasizes Python, core AI/ML concepts, cloud AI services (IBM Watson), machine learning frameworks, an introduction to LLMs and chatbots, AI solution architectures, and advanced SQL for data management, leveraging a curated selection of professional certificate modules.

weeks.focus: Build a strong foundation in Python programming and data manipulation, essential for AI/ML development.
activities: Practice data cleaning and basic analysis on a small dataset using Pandas.
Set up a Python development environment with necessary libraries.

weeks.focus: Grasp core AI and Machine Learning concepts and gain practical experience with a cloud-based AI platform (IBM Watson).

courses.course_name: Getting Started with AI using IBM Watson

activities: Utilize IBM Watson APIs to build a simple AI service (e.g., sentiment analysis).
Identify common AI/ML use cases in various industries.
Explore the ethical considerations in AI development.

weeks.focus: Explore advanced Machine Learning techniques and understand the basics of common ML frameworks.
activities: Implement a supervised learning model (e.g., classification or regression).
Understand the basic architecture of neural networks.
Evaluate model performance using appropriate metrics.

weeks.focus: Understand the principles behind Large Language Models through practical chatbot development and an introduction to prompt engineering.
activities: Develop a simple rule-based or intent-driven chatbot.
Experiment with prompt variations to guide AI responses effectively.
Deploy a basic web application for the chatbot using Flask.

weeks.focus: Learn to design robust AI solutions, considering cloud-native architectures, microservices, and containerization for deployment.

courses.course_name: IBM DevOps and Software Engineering Professional Certificate

activities: Sketch an architectural diagram for a scalable AI application.
Research best practices for deploying ML models in a cloud environment.
Understand the role of APIs and microservices in AI solution integration.

weeks.focus: Strengthen SQL skills, focusing on data manipulation and pipeline concepts crucial for feeding and managing data for AI systems.
activities: Write complex SQL queries for data extraction and transformation.
Outline a basic data pipeline for an AI project's data needs.
Practice database optimization techniques for large datasets.
